channel.title: Computer Architecture on My blog
channel.description: Recent content in Computer Architecture on My blog

item.title: Computer Architecture (RISC-V)
item.description: This is my revision notes for Computer Architecture (based on RISC-V). In this post, I will go through some basic knowledge of computer architecture (definitions, theories, calculations), RISC-V instructions, arithmetic operations for computers, pipelined processor design and memory hierarchy. This post will provide a low-level view of computer architecture and design, and help understand how a computer actually runs.

item.title: Linux Project
item.description: In this post, I will put some C++, linux, computer networking and computer architecture concepts and theories. In addition, I will also do a Linux high-concurrency web server project in the end to consolidate these knowledge.
